parts.description:
Container for a horizontal application menu bar.
Coordinates open/close state across multiple menus and provides arrow-key navigation.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether every menubar trigger is disabled.

inputs.name: loopFocus
inputs.description: Whether arrow-key navigation wraps at the first/last trigger.

inputs.name: modal
inputs.description: Whether the child menus block outside interaction and lock scroll while open (Base UI default `true`).
